error.session_not_found: The configured session was not found: {error}

hassio_confirm.description: The WAHA Home Assistant app discovered session **{session}** and securely supplied its internal connection settings. Submit to connect it.

data_description.api_key: The replacement API key configured in the WAHA app.

data_description.api_key: The API key configured in WAHA.
data_description.api_url: The internal or network URL of the WAHA API, without a trailing slash.

reconfigure.description: Update the connection to the WAHA server. Normally the HAOS app keeps this synchronized automatically.

data_description.api_key: The API key configured in WAHA.
data_description.api_url: For an external WAHA server, enter its URL such as http://192.168.1.20:3000. The HAOS app is normally discovered automatically.
data_description.session: The WAHA session name, usually default.

user.description: Connect Home Assistant to WAHA. If you installed the companion HAOS app, look for the automatically discovered WAHA integration before configuring it manually.
user.title: Set up WAHA WhatsApp

abort.person_already_configured: This Home Assistant Person already has a WhatsApp recipient.
abort.phone_already_configured: This phone number is already assigned to another contact.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The WhatsApp recipient was updated successfully.

error.invalid_name: Enter a contact name or select a Home Assistant Person.
error.person_not_found: Select an existing Home Assistant Person entity.

data_description.name: Name used for this contact and its notify entity. If empty, the selected Person's current name is used.
data_description.person_entity_id: Optional identity metadata linking this contact to an existing person.* entity. The integration does not modify the Person.
data_description.recipient: International telephone number including country code.

reconfigure.description: Update the individual WhatsApp contact. Person association is optional metadata.
reconfigure.title: Update WhatsApp recipient

data_description.name: Name used for this contact and its notify entity. If empty, the selected Person's current name is used.
data_description.person_entity_id: Optional identity metadata linking this contact to an existing person.* entity. The integration does not modify the Person.
data_description.recipient: International telephone number including country code.

user.description: Add an individual WhatsApp contact. You may associate an existing Home Assistant Person as identity metadata.
user.title: Add WhatsApp recipient

action_failed.message: WAHA could not send the WhatsApp message: {error}

invalid_config_entry.message: The selected config entry {entry_id} is not a WAHA WhatsApp connection.

send_message.description: Send a free-form WhatsApp message through the configured WAHA session.

config_entry_id.description: WAHA connection and session used to send the message.

link_preview.description: Generate a WhatsApp preview for links in the message.
